maven-plugin/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation module in Java 17.
maven-plugin/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for javax.annotation classes (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) which were removed from the JDK in Java 11 and are no longer available in Java 17 without an explicit dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11 semantics, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 features and constraints.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 17 or lack support for newer language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or analyze classes compiled with Java 17 due to bytecode version incompatibilities.

server/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation package in Java 17.
server/pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Java 17+ as it was removed from the JDK.

validators/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation package in Java 17.
validators/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not available in Java 17; code using these annotations will fail to compile without the explicit Jakarta dependency.
